proposed: On the weekday nearest the 15th, every five hours from midnight through 8 p.m., every seven minutes from 0 through 56 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.

On the weekday nearest the 15th, every five hours from midnight through 8 p.m., every two minutes from 3 through 59 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.

On the last weekday of the month, every two hours from 9 a.m. through 5 p.m., every seven minutes from 0 through 56 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.

On the last weekday of the month, every two hours from 9 a.m. through 5 p.m., every two minutes from 3 through 59 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.

On the weekday nearest the 15th, from 9 a.m. until 9 p.m. plus 10 p.m., every seven minutes from 0 through 56 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.

On the weekday nearest the 15th, during the 9 a.m. through 8 p.m. and 10 p.m. hours, every 15 minutes from 5 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.
On the weekday nearest the 15th, from 9 a.m. until 9 p.m. plus 10 p.m., every two minutes from 3 through 59 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.
On the weekday nearest the 15th, every five hours from midnight through 8 p.m., every 15 minutes from 5 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.
On the last weekday of the month, every two hours from 9 a.m. through 5 p.m., every 15 minutes from 5 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.
In January, April, July, and October, on the weekday nearest the 15th, every five hours from midnight through 8 p.m., every seven minutes from 0 through 56 minutes past the hour.
On the 1st and 15th, every two hours from 9 a.m. through 5 p.m., every seven minutes from 0 through 56 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.

On the weekday nearest the 15th, every five hours from midnight through 8 p.m., every minute from 0 through 30 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.
